Step 2: Constru cting a deep learning model which comprises: A generator, configured to take a 3T image x as input and output a synthetic 7T image y 4 ; A spatial alignment network (SAN) mo dule, co nfigured to : tak e the synthetic 7T image 9, and the real 7T image y as inputs; com pute a displacement field 0 between the synthetic 7T image y, and the real 7T image y1 ; apply a spatial transformation to the synthetic 7T image y, based onthe displacement field 0 to obtain a spatially aligned synthetic 7T image SVG 19228673.06-04-2025.MBIOI1AFWFYBX91.SPEC.1.12.1804.1324.1841.1368.svg 0.147 0.123 Chemistry Black and white ;
